Remove `Iterable<Route>` from the class interface, likely because the new Morphia version or code style discourages entities from implementing Iterable directly.
logistics-ejb/src/main/java/br/com/esign.why_exists: While not strictly a compile error, removing Iterable simplifies the entity structure and avoids potential conflicts with Morphia's internal iteration or serialization mechanisms.
